channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Immigration judges issue more than 80,000 voluntary departure orders since Trump took office
item.description: Immigration judges have issued more than 80,000 voluntary departure orders since President Trump returned to the White House, a figure that represents...

item.title: Trump reportedly awards no-bid contract to man who worked on his personal pool
item.description: When President Trump decided to paint the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool blue, he reportedly laid the groundwork to award a $6.9 million no-bid cont...

item.title: U.S. projected to borrow $2 trillion this year
item.description: The Treasury Department is on course to borrow more than $2 trillion by the end of the fiscal year -- up from $1.7 trillion last year.

item.title: Virginia’s Pro-Gerrymander Dems Argued Election Is Single Day After Forcing 45-Day Vote
item.description: The Supreme Court needed to explain what the definition of an 'election' is, so that Democrats could understand.
